holdings.infoBox: EFNL is an equity ETF with a total of 39 individual holdings. The top holdings are Nokia Oyj stock at 21.29%, NORDEA BANK at 17.75%, Sampo Oyj at 6.86%, Wärtsilä Oyj Abp at 4.51%, and UPM-Kymmene Oyj at 4.28%.

overview.description: The iShares MSCI Finland ETF (EFNL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Finland IMI 25/50 index, a market-cap-weighted index of Finnish all-cap stocks. EFNL was launched on Jan 25, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
